3004510.name: Tales of SclObonia
3004510.description:
Ever wonder what it’d be like to get isekai’d with your unserious cousin and have to create new identities to survive in a world of magical and terrifying creatures? Follow the two cousins, Kam and Simon, as they laugh, cry, and stumble through a world they’ve only imagined could be real in games and on TV. 

Tales of SclObonia is a turn-based fantasy RPG featuring dungeons, puzzles, and choice-based questlines. Level grind to your heart’s content to upgrade skills, discover new techniques, and uncover the mysteries of a foreign land.

Squabble up as Simon, a brawler from the Woods of Ingle, as you swing first and ask questions never. 

Analyze the world around you as Kam, as you learn to manipulate the arcane arts of SclObonia and take down your enemies (wits and a wand optional)!
3004510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
